creator: kaz@kobe1995.net
text:
burncd(8) can burn a CD-R[W] at 5-current. But can NOT burn at 4.4RC1.
Please import CD-R[W] support codes of 5-current into 4.4R. Please!

Fix: 

Sorry, I can't fix. But burncd(8) can burn a CD-R[W] at 5-current.
-- 
$BCfB<OB;V!w?@8M(B		<mailto:kaz@kobe1995.net>
NAKAMURA Kazushi@KOBE	<http://kobe1995.net/>
FreeBSD	- Available for IA32 (Intel x86) and Alpha architectures
	- IA64 (Itanium), PowerPC, and ARM architectures under development
How-To-Repeat: # burncd -s 4 data 4.4rc1-install.iso fixate
